getRequiredStakeUSD(uint8).notice: Get required stake in USD terms for display

getStake(uint256).notice: Get stake amount for an agent

graduate(uint256).notice: Graduate an agent — return stake without cooldown.         Called by slasher/attestor when agent meets graduation criteria.

isStaked(uint256).notice: Check if an agent has an active stake

slash(uint256,address).notice: Slash an agent's stake. 50% to whistleblower, 50% burned.

slashers(address).notice: Authorized slashers (can be attestors from AgentRegistry, oracles, etc.)

totalBurned().notice: Total ETH burned through slashing (public audit trail)

updateRequiredStake(uint8,uint256).notice: Update required stake for an agent type (ETH price adjustment)
